name: Disaster Arena
author: Poki
description: Disaster Arena is an online multiplayer game where you must prove you’re the best in a series of wild mini-games! Jump in with your friends, vote for your favorite game, and compete to see who comes out on top. Winners take it all—the trophies and the coins! Use your winnings to snag power-ups or adopt adorable pets. And don't forget to explore the arena—you might stumble upon hidden treasures! Do you have what it takes to conquer the Disaster Arena? How to play Disaster Arena? Move: WASD or the arrow keys Adjust Camera: mouse Jump: the space bar Who created Disaster Arena? Disaster Arena is created by emolingo games. Play their other games on Poki: Escape From School , Sword Masters and Rainbow Obby ! How can I play Disaster Arena for free? You can play Disaster Arena for free on Poki. Can I play Disaster Arena on mobile devices and desktop? Disaster Arena can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play Disaster Arena with my friend? Yes! Disaster Arena is a multiplayer game so you can play it with your friends online!
